sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { formatCurrency } from '../../utils/formatters'; function SummaryCards({ employeeCount, totalPayroll, totalTax, totalTakeHome, effectiveTaxRate }) { return (
Employees {employeeCount}
Total Payroll {formatCurrency(totalPayroll)}
Total Tax Outgo {formatCurrency(totalTax)}
Total Take Home {formatCurrency(totalTakeHome)}
Effective Tax Rate {effectiveTaxRate}%
); } export default SummaryCards;
